title: MarkRead silently fails when chat has no read position after re-fetch
description: In client_task.rs MarkRead handling, if read_positions has no entry for chat_id, the code re-fetches all read positions and retries. In the retry branch (lines 317-327), if read_positions.get(&chat_id) still returns None (e.g. the server has no ReadPosition object for this chat), the let _ = ... send is silently discarded — no error is sent to the UI, no log entry, no indication the MarkRead was dropped. The first branch (line 292) correctly errors, but the second branch swallows the failure. — Maintenance consequence: unread badge counts will not update and the user will not know why; silent failure makes this very hard to debug in production.
